6:
WITH cust_consumption AS (
   SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment,
          SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
   FROM customers c
   JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
   WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK'
     AND ym.Date LIKE '2013%'
     AND c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
   GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
),
min_total AS (
   SELECT MIN(total_consumption) AS min_total FROM cust_consumption
),
min_cust AS (
   SELECT cc.Segment, cc.total_consumption
   FROM cust_consumption cc
   JOIN min_total mt ON cc.total_consumption = mt.min_total
),
seg_avg AS (
   SELECT Segment, AVG(total_consumption) AS avg_consumption
   FROM min_cust
   GROUP BY Segment
)
SELECT 
   (SELECT avg_consumption FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment='SME') -
   (SELECT avg_consumption FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment='LAM') AS diff_SME_LAM,
   (SELECT avg_consumption FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment='LAM') -
   (SELECT avg_consumption FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment='KAM') AS diff_LAM_KAM,
   (SELECT avg_consumption FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment='KAM') -
   (SELECT avg_consumption FROM seg_avg WHERE Segment='SME') AS diff_KAM_SME;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
7:
SELECT Segment FROM (
  SELECT c.Segment,
         (SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,0,4)='2013' THEN ym.Consumption END) -
          SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,0,4)='2012' THEN ym.Consumption END))
         / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,0,4)='2012' THEN ym.Consumption END),0) * 100.0 AS pct
  FROM yearmonth ym
  JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
  WHERE c.Currency='EUR'
    AND substr(ym.Date,0,4) IN ('2012','2013')
  GROUP BY c.Segment
)
ORDER BY pct DESC
LIMIT 1
UNION ALL
SELECT Segment FROM (
  SELECT c.Segment,
         (SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,0,4)='2013' THEN ym.Consumption END) -
          SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,0,4)='2012' THEN ym.Consumption END))
         / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN substr(ym.Date,0,4)='2012' THEN ym.Consumption END),0) * 100.0 AS pct
  FROM yearmonth ym
  JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
  WHERE c.Currency='EUR'
    AND substr(ym.Date,0,4) IN ('2012','2013')
  GROUP BY c.Segment
)
ORDER BY pct ASC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

JOIN account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN client cl ON d.client_id = cl.client_id
JOIN card c ON d.disp_id = c.disp_id
WHERE strftime('%Y', t.date) = '1998'
  AND c.type = 'credit'
  AND t.amount < (
    SELECT AVG(t2.amount)
    FROM trans t2
    JOIN disp d2 ON t2.account_id = d2.account_id
    JOIN card c2 ON d2.disp_id = c2.disp_id
    WHERE strftime('%Y', t2.date) = '1998'
      AND c2.type = 'credit'
  );	----- bird -----	financial

FROM disp d

      );	----- bird -----	financial

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.gender = 'Female' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT c.client_id)
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN district di ON a.district_id = di.district_id
WHERE di.A10 > 10000;	----- bird -----	financial
492:
SELECT CASE WHEN v1996 = 0 THEN NULL ELSE (v1997 - v1996) * 100.0 / v1996 END AS growth_percent
FROM (
    SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN yr = '1996' THEN amt END) AS v1996,
           SUM(CASE WHEN yr = '1997' THEN amt END) AS v1997
    FROM (
        SELECT strftime('%Y', l.date) AS yr,
               SUM(l.amount) AS amt
        FROM client c
        JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
        JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
        JOIN loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id
        WHERE c.gender = 'Male'
          AND l.date BETWEEN '1996-01-01' AND '1997-12-31'
        GROUP BY yr
    )
) s;	----- bird -----	financial

SELECT COUNT(*) AS frequency,
       (SELECT o2.k_symbol
        FROM "order" o2
        JOIN account a2 ON o2.account_id = a2.account_id
        JOIN disp d2 ON a2.account_id = d2.account_id
        JOIN client c2 ON d2.client_id = c2.client_id
        WHERE c2.client_id = 3
        GROUP BY o2.k_symbol
        HAVING SUM(o2.amount) = 3539
        LIMIT 1) AS purpose
FROM "order" o
JOIN account a ON o.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
WHERE c.client_id = 3;	----- bird -----	financial

FROM client c
JOIN account a ON c.district_id = a.district_id
WHERE c.gender = 'Female'
  AND c.district_id IN (SELECT district_id FROM district WHERE A10 = (SELECT MIN(A10) FROM district))
  AND c.birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date)
                      FROM client
                      WHERE gender = 'Female'
                        AND district_id IN (SELECT district_id FROM district WHERE A10 = (SELECT MIN(A10) FROM district)));	----- bird -----	financial

497:
SELECT c.client_id AS identity,
       (strftime('%Y','now') - strftime('%Y',c.birth_date)) AS age,
       cr.card_id,
       cr.type
FROM   client c
JOIN   disp d      ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN   account a   ON d.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN   card cr     ON d.disp_id = cr.disp_id
WHERE  a.frequency = 'high'
  AND  cr.type = 'credit';	----- bird -----	financial
